name: Aub Group Limited
analysis: AUB's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 28% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$28.7600, stop A$25.0965, target A$32.3501 (0.98:1) — then trail it.
